notes: Edit the .keywords array below to add or remove blog topics.
Each string becomes ONE blog post.
Keywords already used appear in content/blog-state.json under .done — they will be skipped.
The cron in .github/workflows/auto-blog.yml runs every 4 hours and writes up to 10 blogs per run.
